name: grimoire
description: A personal grimoire of reusable workflow skills for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflow skills for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Grimoire is a practical public library of reusable coding-agent workflow skills. It currently includes bootstrap guidance for loading applicable skills and maintenance guidance for evolving the skill library safely.
defaultPrompt: Use Grimoire before working in this repo.
Check this skill library before publishing.
